title: Frontend: Guided Abstention Card
description: Create AbstentionCard component for guided abstention responses. Shows Chinese message + query reformulation suggestions + clickable example questions. NOTE: Mode values ('no_context', 'evidence_gate_abstain') must match IMPL-002's types.ts update.
acceptance_criteria: New AbstentionCard component renders for mode=no_context and mode=evidence_gate_abstain
Template A (insufficient evidence): Chinese message + reformulation suggestions
Template C (no documents): Chinese message + example questions
Abstention card does NOT show error/warning styling
Clicking suggestion/question submits it as new query
Both no_context and evidence_gate_abstain use same visual style
implementation_steps: 0. MANDATORY READS: Read all files listed in agents_compliance.mandatory_reads BEFORE any code changes
1. Read types.ts to verify mode values exist (or will exist after IMPL-002)
2. Create AbstentionCard.tsx with Template A and C support
3. Add Chinese abstention messages as constants
4. Add suggested questions from existing suggestedQuestions config
5. Add click handler to submit suggestion as new query
6. Integrate AbstentionCard into PortalChatPage.tsx response rendering
7. Ensure abstention mode detection: mode === 'no_context' || mode === 'evidence_gate_abstain'
8. /review: Review all changes before marking complete

agents_compliance.reason: Frontend-only: creates component + modifies page. No schema/API/retrieval changes. Mode values consumed from types.ts (set by IMPL-002). Meets Lite Mode conditions.
agents_compliance.note: Depends on IMPL-002 having updated types.ts with mode values. If IMPL-005 runs before IMPL-002, use string literals and verify consistency during integration.
